title: All Arrows Infinity Fix
description: Forces Infinity enchantment to work with all arrows in 1.16 - 1.21. All your favorite mod loaders.
body:
# A simple modification which allows all arrows to work with the Infinity Enchantment. **Demonstration**

[**Follow the link below and use code "JACKBUSTERS" at checkout for 25% off server hosting.**](https://bisecthosting.com/jackbusters?r=All-Arrows-Infinity-Fix-Modrinth) [![Rent a server discount](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ba99da02-fd57-4ccc-89a5-9a5bba0922d2.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/jackbusters?r=All-Arrows-Infinity-Fix-Modrinth)
**Features** - All arrows, including Spectral and Tipped Arrows, will work with the Infinity enchantment - Will work with most modded arrows as well - If using any version of Forge/NeoForge, or Fabric/Quilt 1.20.5 and above, will additionally work with most modded bows **Difference Between Modded Versions & Data Pack:**
While the modded versions use mixin to check if a projectile weapon has infinity, the Data Pack version simply replaces the infinity enchantment itself. If you have another Data Pack which replaces the infinity enchantment, the modded version can maintain compatibility. Configurable, balanced version, of this mod: [Most Arrows Infinity Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/most-arrows-infinity-fix) Like this mod? You may also like Xtra Arrows (Fully Compatible with All Arrows Infinity Fix): [Xtra Arrows](https://modrinth.com/mod/xtra-arrows)
